research.task: Re-audit Messaging MVP and Admin Dashboard MVP against strict acceptance and identify the single top-priority next slice.

builder.task: Polish only high-signal Greek messaging/admin moderation copy inconsistencies and commit minimal copy updates.

developer.task: Stabilize messaging/admin report-action + queue consistency, run build, and commit a clean functional slice.

lastDecision: Messaging moved from broad implementation into strict closure mode; this cycle captured report-action/read-state hardening and now shifts top focus to closing Admin Dashboard MVP gaps (auth + unified queue behavior).
